message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor User
participant JobManager as JobManager
participant Nodes
participant ESDM
participant Post Processing Library
participant Storage

User -> JobManager: submit job(IN, OUT)
JobManager -> Nodes

rectangle Initialization {
  Nodes -> Storage: read IN=x
  Storage --> Nodes: return
}

rectangle Loop {
  activate Nodes
  Nodes -> Nodes: compute
  Nodes -> ESDM: write async OUT=y
  ESDM -> Storage: write snapshot (async)
  ESDM -> Post Processing Library: trigger post processing if region effected
}

rectangle In Situ Post Processing {
  activate Post Processing Library
  Post Processing Library -> Post Processing Library: perform post processing
  Post Processing Library -> Storage: (could write result directly)
  Post Processing Library --> ESDM: return
  ESDM -> Storage: write post processing result
  ESDM --> Nodes: return
  Nodes --> User: OUT files become visible
}

rectangle Finalize {
  Nodes --> User: All OUT files become visible to subsequent users.
}

Note right of ESDM: multiple iterations

@enduml
